title: Critique a Feature Idea
description: Stress-test a product idea before committing to it.
content:
Here's a feature idea: {{idea}}

Play skeptical PM. Ask: what user problem does this actually solve, and how do we know it's real? Who's it for, and is that a big enough group? What's the simplest version that would validate it? What are we NOT building if we build this? What would make this fail? End with: is this worth a cheap experiment, a full build, or a pass — and why.
